conditional_hypotheses_policy: The certified hypotheses are exactly the parameters and assumptions appearing in each listed Lean declaration.
dependency_chain_policy: The dependency chain is the Lean import list of the certified source file; this certificate does not claim repository-level closure beyond the listed declarations.
nonclaims: No general finite-model-theory closure is claimed.
No unguarded FO locality theorem is claimed.
No Fagin theorem or 0-1 Law result is claimed.
No external validation or adoption claim is made.
scope: scoped certificate for one bounded verified distance-theorem family only
